axioms.name: Multi-Perspectival Synthesis
axioms.statement: Truth in narrative is found at the intersection of conflicting critical roles. Exhaustive coverage requires simultaneous activation of all eight perspectives.

axioms.name: Complete Ingestion Requirement
axioms.statement: The entire narrative artifact must be read and held in context before any diagnostic documents are produced.

axioms.name: Deliverable Autonomy
axioms.statement: Each analytical deliverable (Beat Map, Character Atlas, etc.) must function independently while contributing to a unified synthesis.

levels.name: ANALYST_PACKAGE
levels.description: The complete set of 8 core documents plus supplements

levels.name: CRITICAL_PERSPECTIVE
levels.description: One of eight specialized analytical roles

levels.name: OBSERVATION_TAG
levels.description: The atomic unit of role-specific insight

core_algorithms.name: 8-Role Activation Protocol
core_algorithms.purpose: Simultaneously process narrative data through eight distinct critical lenses
core_algorithms.pseudocode: FOR each_moment in artifact: [AESTHETE] -> evaluate form; [DRAMATURGIST] -> analyze tension; [NARRATOLOGIST] -> map mechanisms; [ART_HIST] -> note lineage; [CINEPHILE] -> comp works; [RHETORICIAN] -> analyze argument; [PRODUCER] -> assess feasibility; [FIRST-READER] -> report emotion; RETURN role_matrix_output;

core_algorithms.name: Ingestion Cycle
core_algorithms.purpose: Prepare narrative for analysis through iterative, specialized readings
core_algorithms.pseudocode: 1. INITIAL_READ (Emotion/Engagement); 2. STRUCTURAL_READ (Act breaks/Nodes); 3. ANALYTICAL_READ (Scene annotation/Arc mapping); 4. SYNTHESIS (Pattern identification); RETURN analyzed_context;

diagnostic_questions.question: Have all eight roles contributed observations to the final report?
Was the script read completely before analysis documents were started?
Is every diagnostic assessment backed by textual evidence (Line/Page)?
Does the report include a prioritized Revision Roadmap?
Is the Causal Binding Score derived from an exhaustive Beat Map?
Are 'First-Reader' emotional responses distinguished from 'Academic' theoretical ones?
